name: send_payment_link
description: Sends a Razorpay payment link to the customer's phone number via SMS. Use this when the customer agrees to pay and provides their phone number, amount, and what they are paying for.
pre_call_message: Please hold on while I send you the payment link.

phone_number.description: Customer phone number with country code, e.g. +919876543210

orders.description: Ordered items as a plain readable string, e.g. '2x Sunscreen, 3x Moisturizer'. Never use JSON or natural language.
